markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review growth performance and refine the content strategy for internal communication.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Organic Growth:** GrowthX content drove a 657% increase in engaged sessions (120 → 908) in 3 months, validating the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The strategy is shifting from broad content to focused "content clusters" targeting specific industries (e.g., high-tech, data centers) and building types (e.g., corporate campuses).](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
  - [**Competitive Catch-Up:** Ambient's Ahrefs traffic rating grew from 0 to 1.8K in 3 months, nearly matching Volt's 2K rating and closing the gap on ZeroEyes' 2.6K.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**New Reporting:** A new Looker dashboard will track monthly competitor performance and specific keyword wins (e.g., "weapons detection") to provide clear, executive-ready metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Reporting Challenges

  - [**GA4 Data Pollution:** High-volume, low-quality bot traffic from China is skewing global GA4 metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use "engaged sessions" (10+ seconds, conversion, or multi-page view) as the primary success metric to filter out bots.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic from LLMs (ChatGPT, Perplexity) is low but growing, especially from Gemini.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Gemini's close tie to Google search suggests its traffic will grow with SEO success.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Keyword Tracking:** The current aggregate count of 177 tracked prompts is insufficient for executive reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Report on performance for specific, high-value keywords (e.g., "weapons detection") to demonstrate tangible wins.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
      - [**Context:** Executives will test keywords, so data must show a high probability of citation, not just a possibility.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Competitive Landscape & Strategic Pivot

  - [**ZeroEyes:** A key competitor focused on gun detection for schools.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Uses programmatic SEO ("PSEO") for state-specific gun violence reports.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Ambient, the inventor of AI gun detection, is not recognized as the leader in this high-visibility use case.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [**Volt:** A competitor with a 2K Ahrefs traffic rating that is growing slowly (4.5% in 3 months).](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Verkada:** The market leader, but its traffic growth is stagnant (3% in 3 months).](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** Shift from broad content to focused "content clusters" to build topical authority and communicate a clear strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current content feels scattered, making it difficult to explain the strategy internally.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create a "mental map" of content clusters tied to the customer journey (awareness → decision).](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)

### New Content Strategy & Tactics

  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritize content for high-priority industries and building types.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)
      - [**Industries:** High-tech, manufacturing, data centers (emerging), universities.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=2548.0)
      - [**Building Types:** Corporate campuses, manufacturing plants, hospitals.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
  - [**PSEO Opportunity:** Explore PSEO using proprietary data to create a defensible competitive moat.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3038.0)
      - [**Data Source:** A customer success data collection exercise is underway, gathering metrics like mean time to response.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=2945.0)
  - [**Keyword Research:** Use customer language from Clary call transcripts to identify high-intent keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3498.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Improve consistency and creativity.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)
      - [**Feedback:** Content quality varies, and messaging can be repetitive.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3586.0)
      - [**Action:** Refine prompt instructions to ensure higher quality and more varied expression.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3646.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3110.0)
      - [Refine the content strategy into focused "content clusters" with a clear editorial calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)
      - [Create a new Looker dashboard to track monthly competitor performance (Ahrefs) and specific keyword wins.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
      - [Provide access to the LLM citation tracking dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [Revise prompt instructions to improve content quality and reduce repetition.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3646.0)
  - [**Ambient:**](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3498.0)
      - [Query Clary call transcripts to identify high-intent customer keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=3498.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with the list of high-priority keywords for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/9sj6kWyCdqgxgPeFN9JzazXrnzmcErar?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
